name: sync registries: /standards-add --source-namespace <ns> overrides default id-prefix-based namespace inference
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" --url https://x.com --id x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --source-namespace google --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f "tree/google/x.yaml" ] && echo ok 1>&2
